response.original_title: The Mirror of Malevolence: Chapter One - The Dreary Orphanage
response.overview: A dark fantasy adventure told entirely with marionettes and shadow puppetry. In the town of Dreary, where no happy wish ever endured, twelve-year-old Henry Button yearns for escape.
response.tagline: No wish ever endured. Except one...
response.title: The Mirror of Malevolence: Chapter One - The Dreary Orphanage
